case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF VS. JORGE LUIS GARCIA LINARES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA LINARES, JORGE LUIS , AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA JOYERIA GUADALUPANA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
